decisions.cache_store: PM-OWNED verify_cache table (dashboardable cache-hit-rate, survives restarts, shared across instances; mirrors 7.3/7.4 PM-owns-coordination-state). Integrator queries before a step + writes after.
decisions.pipeline_config: DAG in project settings: verify_steps:[{id,command,depends_on?[],cache_key_inputs?[],timeout_sec?}] Zod 3/4 mirror (like linked_repos/slo). EMPTY verify_steps -> fallback to single verify_command = today's behavior (degenerate 1-step pipeline). Cheap-first, fail-fast, independent steps parallel.
decisions.scope: Cache + multi-stage pipeline + per-step metrics + strict/shadow cache safety THIS campaign. TIA (test-impact analysis) + artifact-handoff DEFERRED to 7.5b (highest false-pass risk; defer until cache+false-pass discipline proven).
decisions.cache_safety: STRICT + VERIFIABLE: key = tree_sha + step_config_sha (no fuzzy match), ANY tree OR config change = miss. cache_enabled kill-switch + cache_mode off|on|SHADOW. SHADOW runs verify anyway, compares to cache, emits verify.cache_mismatch on discrepancy, ALWAYS uses the real verdict = the verifiable proof of no false-pass before trusting the cache.
decisions.pipeline_seam: The pipeline runs INSIDE the existing runVerifyTask (the 7.2 verify seam) - member's verify becomes 'run the cache-aware fail-fast parallel pipeline -> combined pass/fail'; the scheduler above (admit/rebase/land/suffix-invalidate/retry/kill) is UNCHANGED. Cross-repo (7.3 §5.3) runs the pipeline per repo, AND-combined.
decisions.commit_policy: defer to campaign end (project rule: commit when asked); mirrors 7.1-7.4

completed_steps.title: Month 5 design doc
completed_steps.outcome: APPROVED after 1 revision. CACHE-SAFETY CORE (§3/§4) approved + HONESTLY stated: key=(project_id,resource,tree_sha,step_id,step_config_sha) exact-tuple unique-index match (no fuzzy); step_config_sha=sha256(command + sorted cache_key_inputs); tree_sha=Member.rebasedTreeSha. cache_mode off|on|SHADOW: shadow ALWAYS runs real verify + lookup + emit verify.cache_mismatch on discrepancy + ALWAYS uses REAL verdict = verifiable proof-before-trust. HONEST LIMITATION pinned (§4.5): in `on` mode cache is ONLY as correct as operator's declared cache_key_inputs (undeclared out-of-tree input CAN false-pass on stale row); shadow is the detector. flaky/external-state false-pass vectors honestly covered. Reviewer caught a REAL composition bug (FIX 1): the single member-level one-shot AbortSignal (batch.ts:1067, stable across retry loop) reused for fail-fast would BREAK the 7.2 transient-retry contract - a transient blip in a multi-step pipeline aborts the shared signal to kill siblings, then the retry re-calls runPipeline with the PERMANENTLY-aborted signal -> every step killTree's at spawn -> burns all retries in ms. FIX: each runPipeline pass mints a PER-PASS CHILD AbortController forwarded from the member signal (AbortSignal.any / addEventListener once); fail-fast aborts the CHILD; member signal stays the one-shot teardown trigger; fresh child per call -> transient retry re-runs. Single-synthetic-step backward-compat unaffected (no siblings -> child is transparent pass-through -> byte-identical §10). FIX 2: §2.4 cited 4x but didn't exist -> added real §2.1 DAG-semantics+validation, repointed citations. Pipeline runs INSIDE runVerifyTask (PASS predicate exitCode0&&!timedOut preserved), retry/kill/suffix UNCHANGED, cross-repo per-repo pipeline AND-combined. verify_cache migration 0015. merge_attempts.steps additive nullable JSON col for per-step metrics. NO TTL (content-addressed keys never stale). 1 new event verify.cache_mismatch. Re-verify APPROVED.

_step2.title: Shared schemas + verify_steps/cache config
_step2.deliverable: CACHE_MODES/VERIFY_RESULTS enums; verify_steps DAG + cache_enabled + cache_mode in canonical project.ts + Zod-4 mirror routes/projects.ts (+ hasDagIssues cycle-detect in BOTH); schemas/verify.ts; regen openapi+api-types; tests. NO migration.
_step2.outcome: Zod 3/4 mirror (parallelism/linked_repos/slo pattern). verifyStepSchema {id,command min1, depends_on/cache_key_inputs default [], timeout_sec? int}. cache_enabled default false, cache_mode enum(off|on|shadow) default off, verify_steps default []. hasDagIssues PURE helper (dup ids + dangling depends_on + Kahn's topo cycle-detect) DUPLICATED verbatim in BOTH schemas (.superRefine) - load-bearing: without it in the route mirror the 400-gate misses a cycle that would hang the pipeline. ALL 3 cycle shapes rejected (2-cycle/3-cycle/SELF-LOOP a->a - Kahn's leaves self-loop in-degree at 1) at BOTH layers, proven. Extended .refine: enabled -> (verify_command OR verify_steps.length>0) && worktree_root (steps-only config now valid). BACKWARD-COMPAT: empty steps + cache off = inert defaults. Naming: VerifyResultValue NOT VerifyResult (integrator git-ops has a VerifyResult interface - no collision). verify.ts: verifyCacheRowSchema (§3.1 view, Step 3 consumes) + verifyStepResultSchema (§5.2/§7.3, Step 7). 348 shared + 1026 server, openapi+api-types regen, typecheck 6/6.

_step3.title: verify_cache table + service
_step3.deliverable: verify_cache table + migration 0015; verify-cache.service (lookup/record/cacheHitRate, PURE k-v); 5 tests + schema-test ext.
_step3.outcome: CACHE-CORRECTNESS step. verify_cache keyed by uniqueIndex (project_id,resource,tree_sha,step_id,step_config_sha) = THE strict key. lookup = exact 5-tuple .get() -> HIT (PM-owned bump hit_count+1/last_hit_at, §8.5) | MISS null. record = read-then-write upsert (insert-in-try/catch-else-update, recordHeartbeat precedent) PRESERVING hit_count/last_hit_at/created_at on re-record (shadow self-heal overwrites VERDICT only - the running tally + first-recorded must survive for metric integrity). cacheHitRate (§7.2): hits=Σhit_count in last_hit_at window, misses=count created_at in window, ratio null when 0. PURE k-v: NO cache_enabled/cache_mode (integrator gates §4.2) NO TTL (content-addressed never stale §3.5). NO-STALE-HIT PROVEN: each of the 5 key fields differing -> MISS (the false-pass defense at storage layer). hand-authored 0015 (no db:generate, snapshot chain broken). 1031 server tests, schema-gate green (0015 fresh SQLite, table count 27->28), typecheck 6/6.

_step8.title: Full-stack smart-verification E2E (spawned integrator, on/shadow cache, per-step observability)
_step8.deliverable: NEW smart-verify-e2e.test.ts (6 scenarios, each own harness/port/db/spawned integrator); multi-step DAG land + fail-fast; cache on MISS->HIT; shadow mismatch->real-verdict; per-step observability; backward-compat kill-switch. TEST step - no product code (none needed).
_step8.outcome: THE END-TO-END PROOF. 6/6 scenarios PASS, run 3x deterministic non-flaky (~55s each). NO PRODUCT DEFECT surfaced - the whole 7.5 stack behaved correctly through the full stack (PM HTTP + spawned pm-integrator + git worktrees). ===ADVERSARIAL REVIEW RESOLVED THE THRASHED CACHE-HIT MECHANISM: empty-commit-off-the-new-main (proven vs rebase/land code + live git). The cache key tree_sha = content-addressed git ^{tree} (batch.ts:1479 resolveRef('<rebasedCommit>^{tree}')); member 1 (only member in batch) MISSes+records row keyed on tree T1 then on LAND pushes that rebased commit -> new main's tree == T1; member 2 = EMPTY commit (git commit --allow-empty) branched off the POST-LAND main -> rebase up-to-date -> HEAD^{tree}==T1 -> GUARANTEED HIT (server-side hit_count bump). MANDATORY SEQUENCING: member 2 branch created AFTER member 1 lands off freshly-advanced origin/main (pushEmptyOffMain helper hard-resets author clone to origin/main + force-pushes; the obs/integration fixtures create branches up front which does NOT compose). REJECTED: resetToQueued (only legal from integrating->races live integrator), record-preseed (circular - can't know tree a priori).=== 2 REVIEW MUST-FIXES (plan was WRONG): #1 metrics.verify is SNAKE_CASE on the wire (train.ts metricsToResponse maps to snake openapi schema): cache_enabled/cache_mode/cache_hit_rate.{ratio,hits,lookups}/time_saved_ms/per_step[].{step_id,runs,cached,pass_rate,avg_duration_ms,fail_count}/cache_mismatches (camelCase reads undefined). BUT the TIMELINE steps[] IS camelCase {stepId,outcome,cached,durationMs,treeSha,stepConfigSha,logUrl} - the deliberate split, NOT conflated. #2 cache_mismatches hardcoded 0 in metrics (non-persisted SSE relay) - CANNOT climb via metrics -> assert mismatch ONLY via verify.cache_mismatch SSE. 6 scenarios: A multi-step DAG (format->lint/typecheck->unit) lands + timeline 4 steps pass cached:false; A2 fail-fast (lint:exit1 -> rejected, unit ABSENT from steps[] = short-circuit returns only RAN steps); B cache on MISS(hitCount:0)->HIT(empty-commit, same row hitCount>=1 + cache_hit_rate.hits>=1 + time_saved_ms>0); C SHADOW false-pass-detector (sentinel-flip: member1 records gate:pass, create sentinel OUTSIDE checkout=tree-invariant, member2 empty-commit same tree T -> cached pass but real fail -> REJECTED + main unchanged + verify.cache_mismatch SSE + row self-heals to fail preserving createdAt/hitCount); D per-step observability (timeline camel + metrics.verify snake echo cache_enabled/mode + cache_hit_rate.lookups>=1 + per_step); E backward-compat kill-switch (verify_steps:[] + cache off -> 7.4-identical land/reject + cache INERT getVerifyCache=[] + lookups:0). win32-safe (exit0/exit1 cmd builtins shell:true; ping -n 3 timed; cmd /c if exist ABS-sentinel gate forward-slashed). Bounded-poll discipline (generic pollUntil + pollTerminal@40s; cache-row AND member-state polled INDEPENDENTLY = Step-13 race; only fixed sleep = ~300ms SSE-establish grace). Each scenario own harness (no shared server -> leaked integrator can't cross-wedge; airtight SIGTERM->SIGKILL teardown + liveProcs hook). typecheck 6/6, integrator-ref 193 passed/1 skip (+6 e2e), pnpm test 10/10 turbo, lint clean. ===PHASE 7.5 PROVEN END-TO-END; Step 9 = documentation (final step).===

_step7.title: Per-step metrics on the train dashboard (persist merge_attempts.steps + integrator sends + web render)
_step7.deliverable: additive nullable merge_attempts.steps JSON col + migration 0016; integrator maps PipelineStepResult[]->VerifyStepResult[] and sends on completeAttempt; web VerifyCacheSection (dashboard) + per-step timeline rows; tests. metrics.service.ts UNTOUCHED (§7.1).
_step7.outcome: Step SCOPED DOWN (review confirmed): Steps 4+6 already shipped the MetricsBundle verify block + verify_cache + the integrator PipelineStepResult[]. Step 7 = (A) persist, (B) integrator send, (C) web render. §7.1 PIN HONORED: the metric per_step derives from verify_cache NOT merge_attempts.steps (persisted steps feed the TIMELINE only) -> metrics.service.ts UNTOUCHED. A: nullable steps JSON col (failedFiles convention text mode:json $type<VerifyStepResult[]>, null on all 7.1-7.4 attempts no backfill); hand-authored 0016 (ALTER TABLE ADD steps text; journal idx16 when:1781136000000=+86400000, NO db:generate/snapshot - meta/ only has 0000-0006, migrate reads journal+.sql); shared mergeAttemptSchema + completeSchema passed/failed gain optional steps (cancelled does NOT); service persist if(body.steps!==undefined) on the existing ai_agent gate. B: toVerifyStepResults map (logUrl from step.verify.logPath||undefined, drop verify; outcome pass|fail matches enum; treeSha/stepConfigSha present -> satisfies verifyStepResultSchema, no 400). Member.steps single slot (single-repo sound: verified=no further runPipeline overwrite before land; transient-fail completes synchronously with its own steps). C: web VerifyCacheSection (mode badge + hit-rate/time-saved/mismatch-red-if>0 MetricCards + null-safe per-step Table + cache-disabled state) after MetricsSection; AttemptBody per-step rows (stepId+pass/fail+hit-chip+duration+log-link, additive null->7.4-preserved). Regen order shared-build->openapi:export->generate:api. 4 FOLDED FIXES (adversarial review) all in: M1 (LOAD-BEARING) - grouped passing-land completeAttempt is in group-land.ts where pipeI/pipeO out of scope -> threaded innerSteps/outerSteps through the ready_to_land outcome from group-integration.ts (else grouped attempts blank timeline); C1 - getTimeline needs 3 edits (TimelineEvent iface + inline-cast + event-push all enumerate fields, omit steps) not 1; C2 - logUrl is NOT top-level on PipelineStepResult (from step.verify.logPath, map before dropping verify); C3 - the detail-view LOCAL Zod-4 mergeAttemptSchema mirror also needs steps (else getById strips it). Zod-3/4 split honored (route mirrors verifyStepResultMirror .openapi, never imports the Zod-3 schema). ADDITIVE discipline: steps nullable/optional everywhere -> ALL existing fixtures/tests green unmodified. typecheck 6/6, FULL pnpm test 10/10 turbo (server 1046, integrator 187/1skip, web 43, shared 348, mcp 106 - all pre-existing GREEN), migration 0016 applies (schema-gate fresh SQLite, journal 17 entries). Friction: integrator var-name collision (innerSteps/outerSteps config vars -> renamed mine *StepResults); web 2nd-list-role collision (per-step ul -> div); group-land .toEqual->.toMatchObject. ===PHASE 7.5 FUNCTIONALLY COMPLETE (steps 2-7); Step 8 = full-stack E2E, Step 9 = docs.===

_step6.title: Cache-aware pipeline execution + shadow mode (the cache-correctness step)
_step6.deliverable: NEW step-config-sha.ts (sha256 canonical-json §3.3); verify-pipeline.ts runStep made cache-aware (off/on-HIT/on-MISS/shadow §5.3); batch.ts+group-integration.ts build per-lane/per-repo cache ctx; config/pm-client/index surface cache_enabled/cache_mode; recovery cache-OFF; 20 new tests. NO PM/server changes.
_step6.outcome: THE CACHE-CORRECTNESS STEP (the no-false-pass-from-stale-cache invariant). runStep §5.3 decision: OFF/disabled/no-cache-ctx -> byte-identical Step 5 (no lookup/record, the kill-switch true no-op); ON+HIT -> SKIP runVerify, outcome=hit.result, synthesized VerifyResult, cached:true, NO record (server bumped hit_count on lookup); ON+MISS -> run + record IFF classifyVerifyFailure!==transient (timedOut IS recorded, a transient is not a verdict); SHADOW -> ALWAYS run, real=PASS(v), emit verify.cache_mismatch on hit&&hit.result!==real, record real verdict (self-heal), outcome=real ALWAYS (NEVER cached) = THE false-pass detector. Synthesized cached-fail VerifyResult {exitCode: fail?1:0, timedOut:false, ...} -> classifyVerifyFailure=real -> STRAIGHT reject NEVER transient retry; cached-pass synthetic -> PASS() true -> HIT flows downstream IDENTICALLY (no special-casing; the wave fail-fast capture + failingStep + onMemberFailed consume the HIT result shape unchanged). best-effort I/O: lookup-throw->MISS (never false hit), record/emit-throw->warn+continue (cache I/O NEVER fails a member or blocks a land; the try/catch scopes ONLY pmClient calls, never runVerify/the verdict). step_config_sha=sha256(JSON.stringify({command,cache_key_inputs:sorted})) byte-for-byte §3.3 (excludes depends_on/timeout_sec/id/tree_sha). cache ctx built ONCE outside the for(;;) retry (treeSha stable - the retry does NOT re-rebase). ===ADVERSARIAL-REVIEW CAUGHT A LATENT BUG (CLARIFICATION A): member.rebasedTreeSha + asm.Ri + asm.Ro are all COMMIT shas (field-name misnomer - rebaseOnto/updateSubmoduleGitlink return git rev-parse HEAD); a commit sha carries a committer timestamp -> non-content-addressed -> cache would ALWAYS MISS (dead cache). FIX: derived the real content-addressed TREE shas via gitOps.resolveRef('<commit>^{tree}') for the single-repo key + BOTH group keys (inner Ri^{tree}, outer Ro^{tree}, asserted distinct 40-hex, != Ri/Ro). CLARIFICATION B: group-recovery R1 roll-forward has no stable tree sha in hand -> left cache-OFF (cache:undefined -> off-path byte-identical, zero risk; orphan-recovery rare, gains nothing).=== HONEST §4.5 LIMITATION represented faithfully (NOT solved-by-structure): in `on` mode the cache is only as correct as declared cache_key_inputs; an undeclared out-of-tree input CAN false-pass; defenses = strict content-addressed 5-tuple key (kills in-tree+declared-config drift) + SHADOW as the detector + cache_enabled kill-switch; discipline = declare->prove-with-shadow(zero mismatches)->flip-on. §13 records 3 deviations (non-null verify; tree-sha derivation; recovery cache-off). typecheck 6/6, integrator-ref 187 passed/1 skip (+20: 7 sha + cache classes 1-10 + batch 7.6/7.7/7.8 lifted + cross-repo distinct-tree-sha; ALL existing batch/group/pipeline GREEN unmodified = off-mode-byte-identical proof), pnpm test 10/10 turbo. ALL 11 test classes pass incl #4 shadow-false-pass-detector (member REJECTS despite cached pass) + #7 synthesized-cached-fail->real-reject. ===PM+integrator cache pipeline COMPLETE (steps 2-6). Step 7 = per-step metrics on the dashboard (web, additive).===

_step5.title: Integrator pipeline executor (DAG/fail-fast/parallel) + runVerifyTask seam swap
_step5.deliverable: NEW verify-pipeline.ts runPipeline(steps,ctx); swap runVerifyTask single runVerify -> runPipeline; group per-repo + group-recovery swaps; surface verify_steps through config/pm-client/BatchDeps/index; 12 new tests. NO cache (Step 6). NO PM changes.
_step5.outcome: LOAD-BEARING INTEGRATOR STEP. runPipeline: topo-WAVE scheduling (every remaining step whose depends_on subset-of passed runs CONCURRENT per wave), PER-PASS CHILD AbortController forwarded from member signal (addEventListener once / aborted short-circuit; EVERY step's runVerify gets the CHILD not ctx.signal), FAIL-FAST race-safe first-fail capture (if(!failing){failing=result;passController.abort()} -> returns the TRIGGER not SIGTERM abort-casualties), defensive cycle-escape (real-fail failingStep, no hang). ctx={gitOps,cwd,verifyTimeoutSec,signal?,logsDir,attemptId}. THE DESIGN-REVIEW FIX PROVEN: member signal stable across for(;;) retry; each runPipeline call mints a FRESH child from the un-fired member signal -> a transient fail aborts THIS pass's child, the retry re-calls runPipeline -> NEW child -> steps RE-RUN (batch test: transient-then-pass = exactly 2 runVerify calls + landed, NOT burns-the-cap; a single shared member signal would fail this). 4 FOLDED FIXES (from adversarial review) all in: (1) PER-STEP logPath - single synthetic 'verify' step -> bare ${attemptId}.log BYTE-IDENTICAL today; real steps -> ${attemptId}-${stepId}.log (no concurrent-write corruption); (2) failingStep=TRIGGER not abort-casualty (SIGTERM sibling resolves exitCode:null/signal:SIGTERM which categorize->transient -> would MIS-retry a real-fail; race-safe capture fixes); (3) config relax - loadConfig throws ONLY when verify_command absent AND verify_steps empty (steps-only project now boots), verify_steps surfaced IntegratorSettings/IntegratorConfig/BatchDeps/index; (4) topo helper EXTENDED to emit frontier waves (project.ts validator discards pop-order). SEAM SWAP behavior-preserving: empty verify_steps -> single synthetic step = byte-identical 7.2/7.3/7.4 (PASS exitCode0&&!timedOut; failingStep.verify feeds the SAME {kind:verify,exitCode,signal,stdout,stderr,timedOut} to classifyVerifyFailure/onMemberFailed; bail-guards member.state!==verifying UNCHANGED; catch/finally UNCHANGED). Group: 2 per-repo runVerify -> 2 runPipeline (signal:undefined explicit, no cross-repo abort), AND-combined; group-recovery R1 roll-forward -> runPipeline synthetic (recovery-${id}.log byte-identical). Removed dead logPathFor/PASS/verifyLogPath/path. typecheck 6/6, integrator-ref 167 passed/1 skip (12 new: 9 pipeline unit + 3 batch-seam; ALL existing batch/group/recovery/land tests green UNMODIFIED = backward-compat regression proof), pnpm test 10/10 turbo. ===STEP 5 = pipeline runs EVERY step (no skip); Step 6 adds cache-aware skip + shadow.===

_step4.title: REST: cache config + hit metric + debug GET + mismatch event + pm-client
_step4.deliverable: verify-cache.service list/timeSaved/perStep; metrics.service additive verify block; routes/verify-cache.ts (debug GET + 3 integrator endpoints); VERIFY_CACHE_MISMATCH event; pm-client 3 methods; regen.
_step4.outcome: REST/event/client glue. Metrics bundle gains ADDITIVE verify block (cache_hit_rate {ratio,hits,lookups} + time_saved_ms=Σ(hit_count×duration_ms) over last_hit_at window + per_step + cache_enabled/cache_mode) - 7.4 metrics tests UNCHANGED. Debug GET /verify-cache requireUser (telemetry not admin, member 200/no-token 401). 3 INTEGRATOR endpoints AI_AGENT-gated (requireIntegrator inline, non-ai_agent 403 tested): POST verify-cache/lookup (server-side hit bump) + /record + /mismatch (NON-PERSISTED relay merge-batches pattern -> emit VERIFY_CACHE_MISMATCH). pm-client lookupVerifyCache (row|null) + recordVerifyCache + emitVerifyCacheMismatch (fire-and-forget 202). cache_mismatches surfaced 0 (non-persisted relay §9 - live count is dashboard-side, honest limitation documented). events.ts additive extras (tree_sha/step_id/cached_result/real_result). LOCAL Zod-4 row mirror (no @pm/shared Zod-3 into createRoute). 1046 server + 155 integrator (pm-client 14), openapi+api-types regen, typecheck 6/6. ===PM SIDE COMPLETE (steps 2-4). Steps 5-6 = INTEGRATOR (pipeline executor + cache-aware/shadow, highest-risk).===

_step9.title: Documentation (FINAL)
_step9.deliverable: CLAUDE.md 7.5 paragraph; docs/integrator-deployment.md §16 operator guide; design §13 Step-7 deviations. Docs only.
_step9.outcome: FINAL STEP. 3 doc surfaces, fact-checked against shipped code (adversarial verify confirmed all 17 anchor claims). CLAUDE.md: Smart-verification (7.5) bold-lead paragraph (7.4 density + Full-spec footer) after the 7.4 para, +phase-7.5 in the contracts list. docs/integrator-deployment.md: new §16 (16.1 DAG config+schema table+sample PATCH; 16.2 THE shadow->on numbered adoption discipline + 3-mode table + the faithful §4.5 honest-limitation callout (cache only as correct as declared cache_key_inputs, undeclared out-of-tree input CAN false-pass, shadow is the detector, NOT safe-by-structure); 16.3 observability with the SNAKE-metrics/CAMEL-timeline split + cache_mismatches-hardcoded-0 pin; 16.4 failure notes) + a §4.3 settings-table row-trio. design §13: added Step-7 deviations (7.1 snake/camel split, 7.2 cache_mismatches-0) without duplicating the 3 Step-6 ones. NO doc/reality drift found. COMPLETION GATE: typecheck 6/6, pnpm test 10/10 turbo (integrator 193/1skip incl 6 e2e + 18 pipeline + 7 sha; server 1046, web 43, shared 348, mcp 106), lint pre-existing-baseline-only (untouched web .tsx). git-status: only the 3 .md changed, no stray code. NOT committed (campaign commits when the user asks). CLAUDE.md format:check flags a pre-existing BOM/CRLF artifact (not the edit).

open_issues: LOAD-BEARING RISK: cache false-pass (stale cache passing a verify that would really fail = broken main). Defenses: cache key tree_sha+step_config_sha + strict invalidation + SHADOW mode. The 'no false-pass from stale cache' criterion is the whole ballgame - Step 1 design review must scrutinize it hard.

Current verify = single runVerify(verifyCommand) in runVerifyTask (batch.ts ~1410); verify_command single optional setting. 7.5 threads the pipeline+cache inside/around runVerifyTask, empty verify_steps -> single-command fallback.

Recurring hazards: Zod3/4 (LOCAL Zod-4 mirror in routes, NEVER @pm/shared Zod-3 into createRoute); drizzle snapshot chain broken -> HAND-AUTHOR migration (next is 0015), no db:generate; win32 test cmds (ping -n N not sleep); integrator-ref fileParallelism:false; regen openapi+web api-types after route/schema changes; ~pre-existing server+web lint baseline; web has a vitest harness now (7.4 Step 9).
Forward: 7.5b = TIA + artifact handoff (deferred); 7.6 = hardening + multi-train + permissions/operator-role + advisory board.
